summary: Classified the ten open PRs in this live inventory shard independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and the job does not allow merge, fix PR, post-merge close, low-signal close, or instant close actions. Ready/green focused PRs are routed to maintainer review; PRs with failing proof, dirty merge state, unresolved bot findings, or explicit proof/rebase blockers are kept open as independent work.

actions.reason: Keep open as independent focused bug-fix work; failing relevant checks and proof requirements block any close/merge-style action, and this job cannot fix or merge.
Focused green bug-fix PR with sufficient proof should be left for maintainer technical review; no autonomous merge/fix/close is permitted.
Keep open as independent Windows compatibility work; unresolved bot findings, dirty merge state, and failed proof block close/merge-style actions.

Keep open as independent Feishu fix work; unresolved ClawSweeper needs-changes review blocks any close/merge-style action, and this job cannot repair.
Keep open as independent Telegram message-delivery work; unresolved re-review/needs-changes state and active author signal block close/merge-style actions.
Keep open as independent memory-flush fix work; rebase/update request and proof status block close/merge-style actions.
